strings.Value: Every enemy in a 30-foot radius takes {g|Encyclopedia:Dice}1d12{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:Damage}damage{/g} per {g|Encyclopedia:Caster_Level}caster level{/g}. Half of this damage is {g|Encyclopedia:Energy_Damage}fire damage{/g} and half of it is holy. A successful {g|Encyclopedia:Saving_Throw}Reflex saving throw{/g} reduces the amount to {g|Encyclopedia:Dice}1d10{/g} damage per caster level.
